subject: Cloud Computing
title: The Multi-Cloud Reality
description: A quick, practical guide to The Multi-Cloud Reality.

hook.text: 92% of enterprises now use multiple cloud providers. Multi-cloud isn't a strategy anymore — it's the default reality.

buildup.text: Teams choose best-of-breed: AWS for infra, Google for AI, Azure for enterprise. Nobody picks just one provider.

discovery.text: Multi-cloud creates complexity: different APIs, billing models, security tools, and skill sets for each provider.

twist.text: Terraform, Pulumi, and Crossplane abstract multi-cloud. But true portability between providers remains difficult.

climax.text: The future is multi-cloud with strategic intent — not accidental sprawl. The right provider per workload matters.

punchline.text: Nobody uses just one cloud. Managing many is the real challenge.

quiz.question: What is the main challenge of multi-cloud environments?
options: Managing different APIs, billing, security, and skills across multiple providers
Cloud providers block customers from using competing services
Multi-cloud is always more expensive than single-cloud
